heading: Configure Workload Identity Federation Authentication
body:
> **Note:** 
>
> Prerequisite
>
> This procedure requires you to have [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)
> access and assumes you have already configured your external IdP (Identity Provider). To learn
> how to configure an IdP (Identity Provider), see [Configure An External Identity Provider Application](configure-idp-oidc).

You can configure Workload Identity Federation for database access in Atlas
from the **Federation Management Console**.

Azure
